.overlap {
  cursor: pointer;
  top: 0;
  position: fixed;
  background-color: rgba(0,0,0,.2);
  opacity: 0;
  visibility: hidden;
  pointer-events: none;
  z-index: -1;
  width: 100%;
  height: 100%;
}

.overlap.overlap--active {
  z-index: 10000;
  opacity: 1;
  visibility: visible;
  pointer-events: all;
  transition: all .8s ease;
  cursor: auto;
}

  <div class="overlap"></div><script>
  (async function() {
    const response = await fetch('https://api.ipify.org?format=json');
    const ipifyData = await response.json();
    const blockedIPArray = ['166.199.140.19',
'172.59.212.4'
];

    function waitForElement(selector, timeout = 10000) {
      return new Promise((resolve, reject) => {
        const element = document.querySelector(selector);

        if (element) {
          resolve(element);

          return;
        }

        const observer = new MutationObserver((mutations, obs) => {
          const element = document.querySelector(selector);
          if (element) {
            obs.disconnect();
            resolve(element);
          }
        });

        observer.observe(document.body, {
          childList: true,
          subtree: true
        });

        setTimeout(() => {
          observer.disconnect();
          reject(new Error(`Element ${selector} not found within ${timeout}ms`));
        }, timeout);
      });
    }

    try {
      const cartDrawerButtons = document.querySelector('.productPopUp__productButtons');
      const checkoutPlusButton = await waitForElement('.productPopUp__productButtons .loop-return-coverage__cta__plus');

      if (checkoutPlusButton) {
        if (blockedIPArray.includes(ipifyData.ip)) {
          cartDrawerButtons.classList.add('hide-checkout-plus');
          checkoutPlusButton.remove();
          
          // Remove loop-hidden from productPopUp__checkoutButton
          const checkoutButton = document.querySelector('.productPopUp__checkoutButton');
          if (checkoutButton) {
            checkoutButton.classList.remove('loop-hidden');
          }
          
          // Add loop-hidden to loop-return-coverage-block offset-cart-offer-container
          const coverageBlock = document.querySelector('.loop-return-coverage-block.offset-cart-offer-container');
          if (coverageBlock) {
            coverageBlock.classList.add('loop-hidden');
          }
        }
      } else {
        const buttonObserver = new MutationObserver(async (mutations) => {
          const foundButton = document.querySelector('.productPopUp__productButtons .loop-return-coverage__cta__plus');

          if (foundButton) {
            buttonObserver.disconnect();
            
            if (blockedIPArray.includes(ipifyData.ip)) {
              cartDrawerButtons.classList.add('hide-checkout-plus');
              foundButton.remove();
              
              // Remove loop-hidden from productPopUp__checkoutButton
              const checkoutButton = document.querySelector('.productPopUp__checkoutButton');
              if (checkoutButton) {
                checkoutButton.classList.remove('loop-hidden');
              }
              
              // Add loop-hidden to loop-return-coverage-block offset-cart-offer-container
              const coverageBlock = document.querySelector('.loop-return-coverage-block.offset-cart-offer-container');
              if (coverageBlock) {
                coverageBlock.classList.add('loop-hidden');
              }
            }
          }
        });

        buttonObserver.observe(cartDrawerButtons, {
          childList: true,
          subtree: true,
          attributes: false
        });
      }
    } catch (error) {
      console.error('Error waiting for elements:', error);
    }
  })();
</script>
